tournament.name: Duress Crew Presents: New England Summer Regional

decks.notes: The focus of this deck is to control the game through countering spells, removing threats, and stalling the opponent with cards like Standstill and Decree of Justice. With a mix of removal, counterspells, and card advantage, the deck aims to slow down the opponent's game plan and control the board until it can win with a powerful finisher like Decree of Justice or simply outvalue the opponent. The deck also includes utility lands like Mishra's Factory and Dust Bowl to further disrupt the opponent's mana base and board presence.

The deck focuses on quickly setting up the combo of Hermit Druid and passing on the key creatures you need to your graveyard. Utilizing cards like Cabal Therapy, Unearth, and Survival of the Fittest to facilitate the combo, you aim to win the game through a combination of powerful creatures like Akroma, Angel of Wrath and Triskelion. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the quick setup and activation of the combo. The deck requires precise sequencing and careful resource management to successfully execute the combo and defeat your opponent.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying a horde of aggressive goblin creatures to overwhelm the opponent. Cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron help to bring out key creatures early on, while Goblin Piledriver and Goblin Ringleader provide powerful attacks and card advantage. Supporting cards like Mogg Fanatic and Gempalm Incinerator help to control the board and deal with threats, while Siege-Gang Commander adds additional pressure. The deck also includes a small amount of disruption with cards like Naturalize and Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's game plan.

The deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures like Terravore and Wild Mongrel, while also utilizing land destruction with cards like Wasteland and Armageddon. The goal is to disrupt the opponent's mana base and overwhelm them with powerful creatures. The inclusion of cards like Weathered Wayfarer and Sylvan Library helps to ensure consistent land drops and card draw. Overall, the deck aims to establish early board dominance and maintain pressure throughout the game to secure a quick victory.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the Enchantress cards to draw a large number of cards, while using cards like Sterling Grove and Seal of Cleansing to control the board. The deck also includes cards like Replenish and Opalescence to bring back key enchantments and turn them into creatures. With cards like Parallax Wave and Solitary Confinement for protection, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a large number of enchantments on the board and potentially win the game through a combo finish.

The deck focuses on utilizing Oath of Druids as the main win condition, while controlling the opponent's board through removal spells and disruptive cards like Sphere of Resistance. The deck aims to ramp up early with mana acceleration from Mox Diamond and Gemstone Mine, then establish a strong mana base with lands like Rishadan Port and Wasteland. The creatures, such as Terravore, provide additional threats to pressure the opponent while the deck manipulates the board state to its advantage. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent through a combination of control and strategic play.

The main focus of this deck is to establish control over the game by utilizing Oath of Druids to cheat powerful creatures into play quickly. This is supported by disruption cards like Sphere of Resistance and removal spells like Swords to Plowshares to slow down the opponent's gameplan. The deck also includes ramp cards like Mox Diamond and lands like Gemstone Mine to accelerate mana production. Overall, the goal is to disrupt the opponent's strategy while setting up a strong board presence to dominate the game.

The main idea of this deck is to establish the Stasis lock by continuously tapping lands with Stasis in play while using card draw and counterspells to maintain control of the game. This control allows the player to stall the game until they can assemble their combo pieces such as Black Vise or Brain Freeze to ultimately achieve a win condition. The deck also includes disruption cards like Chain of Vapor and Thwart to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The goal is to outlast the opponent and win through a well-timed combo.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling a combo using cards like Hermit Druid, Phyrexian Devourer, and Triskelion to win the game in a single turn. It takes advantage of cards like Birds of Paradise and Wall of Roots to accelerate mana production and filters through the deck using Survival of the Fittest and Cabal Therapy. The deck also includes disruption elements like Krosan Reclamation and Unearth to protect the combo pieces. Overall, the goal is to efficiently set up and execute the combo to achieve victory.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by utilizing the powerful ability of Oath of Druids to put powerful creatures like Terravore onto the battlefield quickly. The deck also includes various disruption spells like Swords to Plowshares and Mana Leak, as well as card draw and selection cards like Sylvan Library and Quiet Speculation. Cataclysm and Armageddon serve as board wipes to keep the opponent from building up too much of an advantage. Overall, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while quickly establishing a powerful board presence.

The main focus of this deck is to slow down the opponent's plays and control the game through a combination of counterspells, card draw, and removal spells. Psychatog serves as a powerful win condition, able to pump up its power and toughness quickly. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Duress and Tsabo's Web to further control the game. The mana base is optimized for consistency, with a mix of Islands, Swamps, and Polluted Deltas to ensure smooth mana development.

The deck focuses on efficiently cycling through cards and manipulating the graveyard to set up the perfect board state for a game-winning combo. By utilizing cards like Attunement and Replenish, players can quickly bring back key enchantments such as Opalescence and Parallax Wave to overwhelm their opponents. Cards like Frantic Search and Intuition provide card advantage and help set up the combo pieces. With the right sequencing and timing, the deck can create a powerful board presence and lock the opponent out of the game.

This deck focuses on locking down the opponent with the card Stasis, preventing them from untapping their permanents. By utilizing various countermagic and bounce spells to protect Stasis, the deck aims to slowly whittle down the opponent's life total with cards like Black Vise while maintaining control of the board. The deck also includes cards like Forsaken City and Gush to help generate extra mana and card advantage, allowing the player to continually maintain the lock on the opponent.

The deck focuses on utilizing the interaction between Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful combo that can quickly overwhelm opponents. By countering or delaying opponent's spells with counter spells like Counterspell, Daze, and Foil, while drawing cards and finding key pieces with cards like Gush, Impulse, and Opt, the deck aims to set up the combo as quickly as possible. Additionally, disruption and protection are provided by cards like Vision Charm, Chain of Vapor, and Misdirection. The deck runs a high number of Islands to ensure consistent access to blue mana for its spells.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by disrupting the opponent's strategy while maintaining card advantage. The deck includes a variety of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw effects to control the board and outvalue the opponent. Additionally, the deck contains cards like Gaea's Blessing and Krosan Reclamation to recycle important cards and prevent running out of resources. The overall goal is to slowly grind out a win by outlasting the opponent and using strategic plays to come out on top in the long game.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures using cards like Zombie Infestation and Survival of the Fittest, then use those creatures for various purposes such as Cabal Therapy or to pump up Wild Mongrel. This allows the player to apply pressure on their opponent early in the game with aggressive creatures and disrupt their hand with Duress and Cabal Therapy. The deck also includes some utility creatures like Bone Shredder and Uktabi Orangutan to deal with certain threats on the board.
